name: River Gee County (Liberia)
description: Red field with the Liberian national flag as a canton in the upper hoist; the upper fly bears a blue rectangle charged with a circle of yellow five-pointed stars, and the lower portion shows a green landscape.
history: River Gee was created in 2000 from territory taken from Grand Gedeh County; its flag follows the design pattern of the original counties' flags.

features.symbolism: River Gee as part of the Republic of Liberia
ring of stars on a blue field, evoking the wider African and global community
